subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 19/26] server41tests: verify filehandle in ADD notification

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite to verify that the filehandle attribute is included and matches in ADD notifications. The test creates a directory delegation, opens a file from another client, records its filehandle via GETFH, and then verifies that the ADD notification includes a filehandle attribute matching the one obtained from GETFH.
